selected_real_development_milestone.selection_rationale: The milestone is a real Sapianta governance decision artifact used to determine supervised production adoption boundaries.

implementation_request.implementation_scope: Create readiness report and guard test only

validation_artifacts: governance conformance evidence: PARTIALLY_CONFORMANT, 18 passed, 2 failed, 0 critical

token_consumption.measurement_gap: No repository-local token ledger exists for Human -> ChatGPT -> Codex or Human -> AiGOL Governance -> Codex workflows.

baseline_comparison.supervised_aigol_workflow: Human -> AiGOL Governance -> Implementation Request -> Codex -> Validation -> Replay
baseline_limitations: Baseline workflow has no comparable in-repository governance artifact ledger.
Baseline token usage is not available as deterministic local evidence.
Baseline operator effort is inferred from workflow shape rather than measured with a timer or action logger.

governance_overhead.rationale: The supervised route adds durable governance and replay evidence, at the cost of report production, guard tests, and explicit conformance validation.

token_reduction.reason: No local token telemetry exists for either supervised AiGOL or baseline ChatGPT workflows.

operator_effort_change.rationale: The operator receives stronger governance evidence but must review readiness boundaries, partial conformance, and adoption recommendations explicitly.

recommended_adoption_expansion.scope: Expand to supervised, promotion-relevant Sapianta development milestones that need governance evidence and replay certification.
recommended_adoption_expansion.excluded_scope: Do not expand to unsupervised autonomous governance, constitutional mutation, or direct production release authority.

remaining_gaps.description: Token consumption cannot yet be compared because neither AiGOL nor baseline ChatGPT workflows emit a deterministic local token ledger.
remaining_gaps.recommendation: Add a governed token and operator-effort telemetry artifact before claiming token reduction.

remaining_gaps.description: Codex remains required for repository mutation and test execution.
remaining_gaps.recommendation: Keep Codex as the implementation executor under AiGOL governance until worker implementation authority is separately certified.

remaining_gaps.description: Governance conformance remains PARTIALLY_CONFORMANT due to hook drift.
remaining_gaps.recommendation: Resolve hook drift before widening adoption beyond supervised primary governance.

adoption_decision.rationale: AiGOL materially improves governance evidence, replay continuity, and fail-closed visibility for real Sapianta development, but still has unmeasured token economics, Codex implementation dependency, and partial conformance drift.
